        with subprocess.Popen(["bash", "-lc", "mktemp"], stdout=subprocess.PIPE) as p:

        try:

    def _get_field(wrk, field, rows, headers=True, use_index=False, nulls=False):
        """Run stats and extract a specific field value."""
        data = [[val] for val in rows]
        if headers:
            data.insert(0, ["header"])
        if use_index:
            wrk.create_indexed("in.csv", data)
        else:
            wrk.create_csv("in.csv", data)
        args = ["stats", "in.csv"]
        if not headers:
            args.append("--no-headers")
        if nulls:
            args.append("--nulls")
        if field == "median":
            args.append("--median")
        if field == "cardinality":
            args.append("--cardinality")
        if field == "mode":
            args.append("--mode")
        result = wrk.run(*args)
        reader = csv.DictReader(io.StringIO(result.stdout))
        for row in reader:
            if field in row:
                return row[field]
